title: Mbtos
compiled_truth: Mbtos is an external contact at [Tozzini](companies/tozzini). Over the corpus period (1999-10-19 to 2000-05-15), Mbtos sent 6 and received 16 emails, totalling 22 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (6), [Afac](people/afac-tozzini) (4), [Brent Hendry](people/brent-hendry) (3), [Lynn Aven](people/lynn-aven) (3), [Andrea Bertone](people/andrea-bertone) (2).
